message:
fix: use macos-13 for x86_64-apple-darwin builds, add fail-fast: false

macos-latest is now ARM64; x86_64 builds need Intel runner (macos-13).
Also disable fail-fast so individual target failures don't cancel
other platform builds. Bump to v0.4.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@ jobs:
     needs: quality-gate
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
       matrix:
         include:
           - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
@@ -38,7 +39,7 @@ jobs:
             archive: tar.xz
             cross: true
           - target: x86_64-apple-darwin
-            os: macos-latest
+            os: macos-13
             archive: tar.xz
           - target: aarch64-apple-darwin
             os: macos-latest

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "storage_ballast_helper"
-version = "0.4.1"
+version = "0.4.2"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "System service that prevents disk-full scenarios from coding agent swarms via ballast files, artifact scanning, and special location monitoring."
